items.operation: 登录、平台 API、首页待办、组织只读、RBAC 权限、菜单页面 smoke
items.evidence: 2026-06-15 platform smoke on http://10.11.100.17:18080 passed 6/6: platform API 16/16, home todo ok with no visible/network/console/page errors, organization read ok, RBAC authority 9/9, menu sample 12/12. Report: /tmp/adp-platform-validation-acceptance-20260615182929/platform-validation-summary.json

items.operation: 业务模块 API/layout 与真实浏览器页面 smoke：BaseSet、LIMS/QCS、WOM、RM、craftGraph、EAM、Measure、WTS、workAppointment 等入口
items.api: GET /msService/... business module routes; see deploy/docker/scripts/adp-business-module-smoke.js and deploy/docker/scripts/adp-business-page-smoke.js
items.evidence: 2026-06-15 business module API/layout smoke and Playwright browser page smoke on http://10.11.100.17:18080 both passed 53/53. Browser report showed no visible error, network error, console error, page error, or request failure. Production-related entries included WOM make task, WOM retirement PDA, RM batch formula, craftGraph, WTS work permit, and workAppointment work plan. Reports: /tmp/adp-business-module-smoke-20260615184508.json and /tmp/adp-business-page-smoke-make-202606151849/business-page-smoke-results.json. This proves route/API/page reachability only; action-level persistence remains untested.

items.operation: 定位新建生产工单或制造任务入口
items.api: POST /msService/WOM/produceTask/produceTask/makeTaskList-pending (query only; no create endpoint observed)
items.backendEntry: not entered: current route exposed only list/query UI, no create action; runtime view layoutDatagrid.buttons is empty
items.evidence: Real browser discovery opened WOM makeTaskList with navigation status 200 and no visible/network/console/page/request errors. Visible buttons were 查询, 仅查待办, 清空; no safe 新增/新建/添加/创建 button was present. Runtime view JSON for WOM_1.0.0_produceTask_makeTaskList has layoutDatagrid.buttons=[]. Only non-GET request was list query POST /msService/WOM/produceTask/produceTask/makeTaskList-pending. Read model identifies WOM_PRODUCE_TASKS and wfm_task_pending, but create write table is not accepted until a create route is found. Report: /tmp/adp-production-action-discovery-202606151930/production-action-discovery.json; screenshot: /tmp/adp-production-action-discovery-202606151930/wom-make-task-list.png
issues: Current WOM makeTaskList route appears to be a pending-task/list page, not the production work-order creation entry.
Runtime compatibility view exposes no grid buttons, so the current rendered page cannot initiate create.
Need to locate the real create page, menu permission, or button authority source before marker-based persistence acceptance can run.

items.operation: 生产状态流转、备料生成、报工、活动开始/结束等写动作落库验收
items.api: POST /msService/WOM/produceTask/produceTask/updateTaskState; POST /msService/WOM/produceTask/produceTask/addOutputByOutPutDetails; POST /msService/WOM/produceTask/produceTask/generatePrepareNeed; GET /msService/WOM/produceTask/produceTask/startActive; GET /msService/WOM/produceTask/produceTask/endActive; POST /msService/WOM/produceTask/produceTask/endEasyActive/{id}
items.backendEntry: WOMProduceTaskController -> WOMProduceTaskServiceImpl methods traced from WOM_6.1.3.4 source; see metadata/production-module-source-action-map.json
items.evidence: Source action map identifies production write endpoints and target tables, but real browser probing showed the current runtime cannot render action pages: makeTaskEdit, makeTaskSubmitView, makeTaskView, makeTaskBatchView, and easyTaskOperateView all return layoutJson 500; makeTaskGraphList returns document 404. Current makeTaskList and prepareMakeTaskList expose only query/clear buttons. Report: /tmp/adp-production-action-discovery-candidates-20260615193213/production-action-discovery.json; source map: metadata/production-module-source-action-map.json
issues: Cannot execute marker-based write operation from the real frontend until runtime layoutJson 500 errors are fixed.
Current production list pages do not expose the source-defined action buttons.
QCS checkout/inspection target tables need deeper table-level trace before those actions can be accepted.

items.verificationSql: select id, code, name, dept_type, coalesce(description,''), company_id, valid, leaf, coalesce(full_path,''), coalesce(lay_rec,'') from public.org_department where code='ADP_E2E_20260615103620_ORGDEP_DEP';
items.evidence: Real browser opened organization page, selected 默认公司, submitted 新增部门 modal. POST returned 200 with id 6587462000591376. PostgreSQL row existed with valid=1, name=ADP_E2E_20260615103620_ORGDEP, description=create marker. Report: /tmp/adp-organization-persistence-20260615183619.json

items.verificationSql: select id, code, name, dept_type, coalesce(description,''), company_id, valid, leaf, coalesce(full_path,''), coalesce(lay_rec,'') from public.org_department where code='ADP_E2E_20260615103620_ORGDEP_DEP';
items.evidence: Browser-context same-origin PUT returned 200 for id 6587462000591376. PostgreSQL row changed to name=ADP_E2E_20260615103620_ORGDEP_EDIT and description=update marker while valid remained 1.

items.verificationSql: select id, code, name, dept_type, coalesce(description,''), company_id, valid, leaf, coalesce(full_path,''), coalesce(lay_rec,'') from public.org_department where code='ADP_E2E_20260615103620_ORGDEP_DEP';
items.evidence: Browser-context same-origin DELETE returned 200. PostgreSQL retained id 6587462000591376 with valid=0, proving soft delete persisted.
